item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stayed in direct execution mode and performed the requested incident analysis without triggering triage or over-methodizing. It correctly treated the three complaints as related but distinct failure points, identified a reasonable shared management-level cause, and separated direct, management, and collaboration responsibility boundaries. No false-fire triage was observed."}
